body:
## Summary
- Added animated battlefield background video
- Added boss idle, attack, and defeated video animations
- Added video blending and edge masking
- Improved responsive boss positioning on smaller screens
- Preserved existing gameplay and backend logic
## Notes
- No backend changes
- No socket changes
- No gameplay logic changes

- ## 中文说明
- 添加了战场动态背景视频
- 添加了 Boss 待机、攻击、受击动画视频
- 优化了 Boss 视频边缘融合与遮罩效果
- 优化了小屏状态下 Boss 的响应式布局
- 持原有游戏逻辑与后端逻辑不变

reviews.body: LGTM! Nice boss animations and battlefield effects.

title: feat: add boss video animations and battlefield background
